_comment: Quarter-turn demo (drill mode — player army only, no enemy, no auto-win): zoom on the Infantry block (seed 12345, uid 1 at ~650,300, facing south), select it, press E to pivot every soldier 90° right in place, hold, then Q to pivot back. Nobody marches and the grid does not reorganize — the men just face the new way, so the block presents its short edge as its frontage. Infantry carry directional pointer marks that rotate to show the facing at this zoom (mark LOD). Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
